rangedWeapons.name: Wraith Cannon
rangedWeapons.baseProfile: ATK 4, Hit User, DMG 6/3, MW (3), Heavy (Dash), Piercing (-4), Crits on 9+
rangedWeapons.profile: ATK 4, Hit User, DMG 6/3, MW (3), Heavy (Dash), Piercing (-4), Crits on 9+

abilities.name: Reanimation
abilities.effect: When a Fighter with Reanimation is slain, place a token within 1". At the start of each turn, on 5+ it is reanimated within 1" with D3+2 HP and may act as normal. A Fighter can only be reanimated once; fail = leave the token and try next turn.

abilities.name: Regenerate
abilities.effect: At the beginning of this Fighter’s activation, it regains D3+1 lost HP.

equipment.name: Jump Pack/Rokkit Pack/Wings
equipment.effect: Gains Jump Move: +3" Move and may ignore terrain and vertical height when repositioning.

equipment.name: Suspensor System
equipment.effect: User’s Heavy Weapons gain the “Heavy (Move)” Special Rule.

abilities.name: Patient and Reactive
abilities.effect: This Fighter may make two activations per turn, and split his AP between 2 those activations. For all intents and purposes, this counts as two separate activations.

spells.name: VOIDFIRE BLAST
spells.effect:
Range: 12"

Pick any point. All models within 2" suffer 2D3 MW. Psyker suffers 1 MW.

Power Surge (MV 11): Radius becomes 4".

spells.name: MEND FLESH
spells.effect:
Range: 12"

Restore D3+1 HP to a friendly Fighter.

Power Surge (MV 10): Restore D3+2 HP and remove 1 Poison/Burning token.

equipment.name: Climbing Equipment
equipment.effect: Ignore the first 2" of vertical repositioning.
